title: coussarea coffeoides
intro: Coussarea coffeoides, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is commonly known as the West Indian coffee tree due to its resemblance to coffee plants. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coussarea coffeoides include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Herbal preparations of Coussarea coffeoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
